parameters.jsCode:
// Generate HTML email body const data = $input.first().json; const statusColor = data.status === 'completed' ? '#28a745' : '#dc3545'; const statusIcon = data.status === 'completed' ? '✅' : '❌'; const html = `

${statusIcon} Evaluation ${data.status === 'completed' ? 'Completed' : 'Failed'}

${data.model_name}

${data.status.toUpperCase()}

Run Type
${data.run_type}
Build
${data.build_name}
Device
${data.device || 'N/A'}
Backend
${data.backend || 'N/A'}
${data.duration_seconds ? `
Duration
${Math.round(data.duration_seconds)}s
` : ''}
${data.status_message ? `

Status: ${data.status_message}

` : ''} View Results

Lemonade Eval Dashboard | Open Dashboard

Notification sent at: ${new Date(data.notification_time).toLocaleString()}

`; return { json: { html, text: `Evaluation ${data.status} for ${data.model_name}. View: ${data.run_url}` } };
